properties.serializedData:
{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# Avoulia V2 — Parcours Analytics

**Real-time funnel tracking:** Chat → RAG → Parcours → Completion"},"name":"title"},{"type":10,"content":{"chartType":"Unstacked Column","legendPosition":4,"timeContext":{"durationMs":86400000},"dataSource":{"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components","componentId":"/subscriptions/12442bba-7b9c-4963-beec-2434a11711b6/resourceGroups/rg-avoulia-fr-dev/providers/microsoft.insights/components/ai-avoulia-dev","query":"customEvents
| where name in ('chat_session_start', 'rag_result_returned', 'parcours_url_proposed', 'parcours_page_opened', 'parcours_step_1_completed', 'parcours_step_6_completed')
| extend sessionId = tostring(customDimensions.sessionId)
| summarize
    chat_starts = dcount(sessionId, 4) where name == 'chat_session_start',
    rag_hits = dcount(sessionId, 4) where name == 'rag_result_returned',
    urls_proposed = dcount(sessionId, 4) where name == 'parcours_url_proposed',
    pages_opened = dcount(sessionId, 4) where name == 'parcours_page_opened',
    step1_completed = dcount(sessionId, 4) where name == 'parcours_step_1_completed',
    step6_completed = dcount(sessionId, 4) where name == 'parcours_step_6_completed'
| extend
    funnel_step1 = round(100.0 * rag_hits / chat_starts, 2),
    funnel_step2 = round(100.0 * urls_proposed / rag_hits, 2),
    funnel_step3 = round(100.0 * pages_opened / urls_proposed, 2),
    funnel_step4 = round(100.0 * step1_completed / pages_opened, 2),
    funnel_step6 = round(100.0 * step6_completed / step1_completed, 2)
| project funnel_step1, funnel_step2, funnel_step3, funnel_step4, funnel_step6"},"name":"funnel_completion_pct"},{"type":10,"content":{"chartType":"Table","timeContext":{"durationMs":86400000},"dataSource":{"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components","componentId":"/subscriptions/12442bba-7b9c-4963-beec-2434a11711b6/resourceGroups/rg-avoulia-fr-dev/providers/microsoft.insights/components/ai-avoulia-dev","query":"customEvents
| where name == 'parcours_page_opened'
| summarize visit_count = dcount(customDimensions.caseHash) by caseHash = tostring(customDimensions.caseHash)
| top 10 by visit_count desc
| project caseHash, visit_count"},"name":"top_cases"},{"type":10,"content":{"chartType":"Donut","timeContext":{"durationMs":86400000},"dataSource":{"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components","componentId":"/subscriptions/12442bba-7b9c-4963-beec-2434a11711b6/resourceGroups/rg-avoulia-fr-dev/providers/microsoft.insights/components/ai-avoulia-dev","query":"customEvents
| where name == 'quickwin_copy'
| extend sessionId = tostring(customDimensions.sessionId)
| summarize session_copies = count() by sessionId
| summarize
    sessions_with_copy = dcount(sessionId),
    sessions_without = 0,
    avg_copies = round(avg(session_copies), 2)"},"name":"quickwin_engagement"},{"type":10,"content":{"chartType":"AreaChart","timeContext":{"durationMs":86400000},"dataSource":{"resourceType":"microsoft.insights/components","componentId":"/subscriptions/12442bba-7b9c-4963-beec-2434a11711b6/resourceGroups/rg-avoulia-fr-dev/providers/microsoft.insights/components/ai-avoulia-dev","query":"customEvents
| where timestamp > ago(24h)
| extend hour = bin(timestamp, 1h)
| summarize event_count = count() by hour, name
| order by hour desc"},"name":"events_timeline"}],"styleSettings":{},"fromTemplateId":null,"$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json"}
